name: Mixed Material Library Bookcase with Doors Natural Wood - Room Essentials™
description:
Bring chic organization to your reading nook with this Mixed-Material Library Bookcase with Doors from Room Essentials™. Standing at a height of 70.4 inches, this adjustable-shelf bookcase has a wood-finish rectangular body in natural brown, complemented by sleek metal legs and door handles in refined black for a stylish mixed-material look. It has three open shelves and a bottom double-door cabinet with a single shelf, providing ample space for displaying your fave books, decor pieces and more.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value

Detailed Dimensions:
Overall Width: 24 1/2”
Overall Height: 70 1/4”
Overall Depth: 11 1/2”
Height of open shelves: 38 5/8”
Width of open shelves: 23”
Depth of open shelves: 11 3/8”
Depth inside cabinet: 9 3/4”
Width inside cabinet: 23”
Height inside cabinet: 24 5/8”
